water.name: Walker Creek
aliases: Walker Creek (private property line to Rush Creek confluence)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(163) — Walker Creek from the private property line (fence) to the confluence with Rush Creek
sources.quotedText: (163) Walker Creek (Mono Co.) from the private property line (fence) to the confluence Rush Creek. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: Wild-Trout Waters: The June Lake Loop Region - California Fly Fisher
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 268749, "Walker Creek", Stream, Mono Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":268749,"gaz_name":"Walker Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13255928.2703, 4567108.3690) converts to lon -119.080030, lat 37.912755 — this point sits almost exactly on Rush Creek's GNIS course (gaz_id 267199) between its Mono Lake mouth and upstream points, confirming it marks Walker Creek's confluence with Rush Creek per the regulation's own citation text; the file's prior coordinate (-119.1350, 37.7900) was ~14km away (a guessed location near June Lake village, not GNIS-sourced) and has been corrected to this confluence point.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout — zero bag limit; catch-and-release only.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch and release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
